---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that's hard or
impossible today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they're worse.

## Scope & constraints

Please keep in mind Chatic's design goals — check any that apply:

- [ ] Keeps the tutor engine **language-agnostic** (no hardcoded language
      strings)
- [ ] Preserves **privacy** (no logging of chat content, secrets stay encrypted)
- [ ] Stays lightweight (targets small free-tier hosts, single static binary)
- [ ] Doesn't add a heavy third-party dependency without justification

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
